notes.note: Quintus Ancharius, son of Quintus, here addressed as proconsul (procos.) — governor of Macedonia c. 56-55 BC. This is one of Cicero's litterae commendaticiae, the letters of recommendation that fill Ad Familiares book 13.

notes.anchor: Lucius and Gaius Aurelius, sons of Lucius
notes.note: Two young Roman brothers, sons of a Lucius Aurelius on close terms with Cicero, commended to the governor for honourable and generous treatment; otherwise unknown.
